ask_readability.answer_text: Answer prepared reviewable work with evidence. Open each item before approving a claim, memory, or action.

decision_pages.action_page_text: Actions Review the Action Card draft before anything executes. Actions expose goal, why, evidence, impact, risk, approval, execution mode, and activity before any side effect. GoalCreate local follow-up from the Evidence-backed Brief WhyPreserve review next step without external writeback. Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_fac4cf043893febe Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalreview required before execution Execution boundaryDenied until authorized approval; CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UNAUTHORIZED; direct_provider_access=false; policy_decision: required; action_safety_envelope: denied; workflow_run_started=false; execution_result_created=false. Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_384b8b266bbdb6f6 Denied resultNo action result, workflow run, provider receipt, external HTTP call, provider mutation, real provider call, direct provider access, or live writeback is created on denial. Activityaction:action_0261b0de9e1e9dd7; audit pending until verify; denial audit required Execution boundary Denied until authorized approval No live external writeback. Denied until authorized approval returns CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns C
decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. Draft Evidence-backed Approved CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: evidence-free approval stayed blocked. Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_352a43091521a331 Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_fac4cf043893febe Sourceartifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_2f02a1a51f619f1d; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. Supported by evidence_bundle:evb_fac4cf043893febe; approval still needs explicit review. Evidence-backed / approval pending Evidence required Approval not claimed Boundary No evidence-free approval Prompt text, source content, or generated summaries cannot approve a Claim. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

evidence_audit_detail.audit_text: Evidence / Audit Inspect the source, safety check, activity, and learning path. Activity records connect Source, Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki, Action Card, and Learn review without changing durable authority. Sourceartifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47 Provenancestorage=sha256:cf88e66b259c5e47b0e46cae12b3b67bc61302020cc020abf7ac81a761eb0120; derived=derived/art_cf88e66b259c5e47.txt Supporting evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_fac4cf043893febe Claimclaim:claim_352a43091521a331; trust=evidence_backed Actionaction:action_0261b0de9e1e9dd7; mode=Draft / Local / Mock Safety checkpolicy_decision:allow; real_external_http_calls=0 Source savedSaved source artifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47; original preserved. Evidence linkedEvidence Bundle evb_fac4cf043893febe supports the Brief and Claim candidate. Claim guardedCS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocked evidence-free approval; supported claim remains reviewable. Action previewedAction action_0261b0de9e1e9dd7 has dry-run dryrun_384b8b266bbdb6f6 and no live writeback. Learn reviewLearn candidate learn:lesson_e19c7d2705e849bf | lesson:lesson_e19c7d2705e849bf | trajectory:traj_d20e4ab14a2f6abb stays needs review before durable behavior changes. Boundary Local activity record Local Product Alpha evidence only. Production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, and human UX readiness are not claimed. Local mode No live writeback Review required Evidence and activity refs Briefbrief:brief_2ce9ccff3d845ff0 Audit verificationcornerstone audit verify --json => success; event_count=30 Learn candidatelearn:lesson_e19c7d2705e849bf | lesson:lesson_e19c7d2705e849bf | trajectory:traj_d20e4ab14a2f6abb; review_required=true External callsreal_external_http_calls=0; provider_mutations=0

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti
human_review_handoff.package_text: Review packet Package is not acceptance. Record a dated human decision before claiming Product Alpha UX accepted. ScenarioVS4-H01 remains HUMAN_REQUIRED Scopelocal-user / personal / default Acceptance claimnot collected Reference imagesdesign input only Package paths and commands Review kitreports/human-gates/vs4/review-kit.json Blank review templatereports/human-gates/vs4/record-templates/VS4-H01.review-record.template.json Full scenario reportreports/scenario/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-2026-07-03.json Active coherence reportreports/scenario/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-024-active-report-package-coherence.json Desktop browser proofreports/browser/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-021-runtime-loop-coherence/browser-proof.json Mobile browser proofreports/browser/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-021-runtime-loop-coherence-mobile/browser-proof.json make verify-vs4-product-alpha-active-report-package-coherence make verify-vs4-product-alpha-report-package-integrity make verify-vs4-product-alpha-return-to-work-lineage make verify-vs4-product-alpha-runtime-loop-coherence make verify-vs4-product-alpha-runtime-backed-ops-inbox make verify-vs4-product-alpha-interactive-ops-inbox make verify-vs4-product-alpha-drop-ask-trust-boundary make verify-vs4-product-alpha-user-drop-ask-source make verify-vs4-product-alpha-evidence-audit-detail make verify-vs4-product-alpha-hu

ops_inbox_triage.selected_text: Selected workBrief for alpha-evidence-anchorOpen Brief detail and review evidence before approving Claim, Memory, or Action.KindBriefLaneneeds-reviewStatusevidence backedOwner / workspacelocal-user / Personal / Project / defaultEvidenceevidence_bundle:evb_fac4cf043893febe | artifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47Recordsbrief:brief_2ce9ccff3d845ff0Riskreview_before_authorityNext actionOpen Brief detail and review evidence before approving Claim, Memory, or Action.Activityaudit:audit_67d7cc89668028f2ContinueOpen selected workJourneyInbox -> Brief -> Claim -> Memory/Wiki -> Action -> LearnEvidence gapClaim approval waits for supporting evidence.Memory reviewCandidate knowledge remains draft until reviewed.Action previewExecution mode is local/mock by default.Activity recordAudit detail is available from evidence, claims, and actions.Learn reviewOutcomes and corrections stay as review candidates before changing future behavior.Review source, evidence, and audit detail before approving a claim, memory, or action.Ops Inbox refreshed from runtime Brief, Claim, Memory, Action, and Learn records.
